name: Falkland Islands (civil ensign)

colors.symbolism: details of the Union Flag canton and territorial badge

description: A British Red Ensign defaced in the fly with the coat of arms of the Falkland Islands — a ram standing on tussock grass above a sailing ship (the Desire).
history: The civil ensign of the Falkland Islands is the British Red Ensign defaced with the territory's coat of arms (granted 29 September 1948 and modified in 1999). It is flown by Falkland Islands-registered merchant ships.

features.role: Coat of arms of the Falkland Islands
